text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Y-you'll help me put t'gether an outfit?! You
mean it, City?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
We'll call it your birthday present. So, what style
are you going for?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what style? Um... Golly, I'm not too familiar
with brand names...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No need to overthink it. Just tell me what kind of
vibe you like.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: V-vibes, right, yeah! Let's see... ummm...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Uh, then... is there an outfit you like wearing the
most?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, it's gotta be my Sansa Odori festival robes!
Mama spent all night sew'n it!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oopsies! That's not what you meant, is it? Haha...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Traditional clothes, huh... Maybe clothes with
Japanese patterns... or perhaps traditionally dyed
fabrics?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
This'll be tough! But we're definitely making this
happen!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: City... Wowzers, you sound like a bon'fide pro!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
A pro, huh? Just know I'm doing this for you,
'kay?
